name: cap-dev
description: Skills for scaffolding, packaging, validating, and submitting Commerce App Packages (CAPs) for Salesforce Commerce Cloud.

interface.shortDescription: Build, validate, and submit Commerce App Packages for Salesforce Commerce Cloud.
interface.longDescription: Skills for the full Commerce App Package (CAP) development lifecycle — scaffold new apps, generate impex configurations, package into registry-ready ZIPs, validate structure and manifests, and submit pull requests.
defaultPrompt: Generate service impex for a REST API integration
